description_long: This object is a rectangular school building complex situated on a green, grid-patterned base, likely representing a lawn or schoolyard. The main structure consists of several interconnected, low-rise blocks with flat roofs, arranged in a roughly oval or horseshoe layout, enclosing a central open area. The building is predominantly light gray or white, with some blue and yellow accents visible on the roofs and walls, possibly indicating entrances or special sections. A dark, curved driveway or road loops around the central courtyard, providing vehicular access. The surrounding base is uniformly green, suggesting grass or artificial turf, and the overall design is compact and functional, typical of modern educational facilities. No playground equipment, signage, or flagpole is visible, and the architectural style appears utilitarian and contemporary.
description: A compact, light-colored school building complex with flat roofs, arranged around a central courtyard and set on a green, grid-patterned base. The structure features a looping driveway and minimal decorative elements, reflecting a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: From this low, side view, the flatness of the building and the looping driveway around the central courtyard are most visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the building's blocky structure and the central open area, with the green base clearly visible.
description_view_2: From the opposite side, the elongated shape of the building and the driveway's full loop are apparent, with roof details visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the building's arrangement around the courtyard and the contrast between the structure and the green base.
